pin-base-image-version.without_evidence: Uses node:22-alpine — pinned major but no minor/patch. Not exact (e.g. node:22.12-alpine3.20).
pin-base-image-version.with_evidence: Uses node:22.12-alpine3.20 — exact version pinned for both node and alpine.

multi-stage-build.with_evidence: Four stages: deps, dev, build, production.

copy-lockfile-first.without_evidence: COPY package.json package-lock.json before npm ci, then COPY . . later.
copy-lockfile-first.with_evidence: COPY package.json package-lock.json before npm ci, then COPY . . later.

npm-ci-not-install.without_evidence: Uses npm ci instead of npm install.
npm-ci-not-install.with_evidence: Uses npm ci instead of npm install.

layer-order-by-change-frequency.without_evidence: OS deps (apk add) in production stage before COPY source. Lockfile before source in deps stage.
layer-order-by-change-frequency.with_evidence: OS deps (apk add) before COPY. Lockfile before source in deps stage.

non-root-user.without_evidence: adduser appuser + USER appuser in production stage.
non-root-user.with_evidence: adduser appuser + USER appuser in production stage.

no-secrets-in-dockerfile.without_evidence: API_KEY and DATABASE_URL ENV lines removed entirely.
no-secrets-in-dockerfile.with_evidence: API_KEY and DATABASE_URL ENV lines removed entirely.

no-secrets-in-compose.with_evidence: API_KEY removed and uses env_file: .env, BUT DATABASE_URL with password is hardcoded in environment: DATABASE_URL=postgres://admin:admin@db:5432/myapp. Still has secrets in compose.

healthcheck-dockerfile.without_evidence: HEALTHCHECK instruction present in production stage.
healthcheck-dockerfile.with_evidence: HEALTHCHECK instruction present in production stage.

anonymous-volume-node-modules.without_evidence: Bind mount .:/app removed entirely. No anonymous volume for node_modules. Assertion requires the anonymous volume pattern for dev scenarios.

depends-on-condition-healthy.without_evidence: depends_on with condition: service_healthy for both db and redis.
depends-on-condition-healthy.with_evidence: depends_on with condition: service_healthy for both db and redis.

healthcheck-every-service.without_evidence: Healthchecks on db and redis services.
healthcheck-every-service.with_evidence: Healthchecks on db and redis services.

security-opt-no-new-privileges.with_evidence: No security_opt on any service in compose output.

cap-drop-all.with_evidence: No cap_drop on any service in compose output.

resource-limits.without_evidence: deploy.resources.limits with memory: 512M and cpus: 0.5 on app.
resource-limits.with_evidence: No deploy.resources.limits on any service in compose output.

oci-labels.without_evidence: No LABEL instruction anywhere in Dockerfile.
oci-labels.with_evidence: No LABEL instruction anywhere in Dockerfile.

combine-run-commands.without_evidence: Separate RUN for apk add and adduser. Not combined.
combine-run-commands.with_evidence: Separate RUN for apk add and adduser. Not combined.

read-only-filesystem.without_evidence: read_only: true with tmpfs: - /tmp on app service.
read-only-filesystem.with_evidence: No read_only or tmpfs on any service in compose output.
